candidates.context: NJDOH is monitoring two New Jersey residents following potential hantavirus exposure linked to the MV Hondius.
candidates.sourceTitle: NJDOH Monitoring Two New Jersey Residents Following Potential Hantavirus Exposure Linked to MV Hondius - NJ.gov

candidates.context: In 2026, a hantavirus outbreak on the cruise ship MV Hondius infected at least 12 passengers and crew, resulting in 3 deaths, with the remaining nine individuals placed under quarantine, prompting European health officials to issue a travel advisory for cruise passengers.
candidates.sourceTitle: Europe to Cruise Travelers Hantavirus Outbreak on MV Hondius Raises Health Concerns for Passengers in 2026 - Travel And Tour World

candidates.context: A passenger evacuated from the hantavirus-hit MV Hondius cruise ship tested positive for the disease in Spain.
candidates.sourceTitle: Passenger Evacuated from Hantavirus-Hit Cruise Ship Tests Positive for Disease in Spain - People.com

candidates.context: Two New Hampshire residents traveled aboard the MV Hondius cruise ship involved in the 2026 hantavirus outbreak.
candidates.sourceTitle: Two NH residents traveled aboard cruise ship with hantavirus outbreak - Valley News

candidates.context: A multi-country outbreak of Andes strain hantavirus linked to the cruise ship MV Hondius has resulted in 12 confirmed cases and 5 deaths across four countries; the Kansas Department of Health and Environment stated that 248 passengers and crew remain in quarantine.
candidates.sourceTitle: 2026 Multi-country Andes Strain Hantavirus Outbreak Associated with a Cruise Ship - KDHE (.gov)

candidates.context: The MV Hondius cruise ship was placed under quarantine in the Netherlands on May 20, 2026, following a hantavirus outbreak that has infected 34 passengers and crew, resulting in 3 deaths.
candidates.sourceTitle: Licensable video: MV Hondius Cruise Ship In Quarantine In The Netherlands after hit by Hantavirus - 05/20/2026 - Reuters Connect

candidates.context: South Africa confirms rare Andes hantavirus outbreak tied to cruise ship MV Hondius.
candidates.sourceTitle: South Africa Confirms Rare Andes Hantavirus Outbreak Tied to Cruise Ship MV Hondius: Global Health Response Intensifies - Travel And Tour World

candidates.context: The ship docked in the Netherlands for disinfection, with 8 individuals in quarantine.
candidates.sourceTitle: Hantavirus-stricken cruise ship docks in the Netherlands for disinfection - Cleveland 19 News

candidates.context: A suspected hantavirus outbreak on the MV Hondius off Cape Verde has left 150 people trapped aboard.
candidates.sourceTitle: Evacuations planned as suspected hantavirus outbreak traps 150 on ship off Cape Verde - Reuters
